title: coreopsis spectabilis
intro: Coreopsis spectabilis, also known as the large-flowered coreopsis, is a flowering plant species native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Coreopsis spectabilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
